class.description: D* Lite incremental-search global planner. Searches the 8-connected costmap grid backward from the goal, caches g/rhs values, and on later plans repairs only the vertices whose edge costs changed (plus a priority-key shift for the moved robot) instead of replanning from scratch. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.
